title: UCI PolicyEnvelope
description: A container for policy constraints and execution requirements related to an intent.

policy_envelope_id.description: The unique identifier for this policy envelope.

intent_id.description: The ID of the intent this policy envelope applies to.

actor_id.description: The ID of the actor signing the envelope.

key_id.description: The ID of the key used for signing.

max_cost_usd.description: The maximum allowed cost for the execution in USD.

risk_class.description: A classification of the risk associated with the intent.

jurisdiction.description: The legal or operational jurisdiction under which the execution must run.

requires_evidence.description: Whether an evidence chain is required for this execution.

allowed.description: Whether the execution can be delegated to other actors.

allowed_capabilities.description: A list of capabilities that are allowed to be used.

required_evidence_kinds.description: The kinds of evidence that must be recorded.

signature.description: The digital signature of the envelope.
